mapper.insert: insert into work_order_attachment_config(config_key, allowed_extensions, max_file_size_mb, max_total_size_mb, enabled, created_at, updated_at) values (#{configKey}, #{allowedExtensions}, #{maxFileSizeMb}, #{maxTotalSizeMb}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update work_order_attachment_config set config_key = #{configKey}, allowed_extensions = #{allowedExtensions}, max_file_size_mb = #{maxFileSizeMb}, max_total_size_mb = #{maxTotalSizeMb}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, config_key, allowed_extensions, max_file_size_mb, max_total_size_mb, enabled, created_at, updated_at from work_order_attachment_config where id = #{id}
select id, config_key, allowed_extensions, max_file_size_mb, max_total_size_mb, enabled, created_at, updated_at from work_order_attachment_config where config_key = #{configKey}
select id, config_key, allowed_extensions, max_file_size_mb, max_total_size_mb, enabled, created_at, updated_at from work_order_attachment_config order by id asc
